name: Havelock North Primary School Junior Playground
Havelock North Primary School Senior Playground
Silverstream Road Childrens Park, Huntleigh Park

tags.description: Playground has sky swing for ages 12+, slides for a range of ages, a toddler area, and a waterplay area. Great for all ages of kids.
Fenced off playground next to Rotunda in Shoreland park
Playground amongst the trees, built with natural materials
Smaller playground. Has swings, slide, short on-rail flying fox. Has two baby swings but is mostly suited to 5 years and up.
